## Collaboration Request Details

### Requested AI Contributions
<!-- Check all that apply -->
- [ ] **Analysis & Critique** - Critical assessment and evaluation
- [ ] **Hypothesis Generation** - Novel theoretical proposals
- [ ] **Question Formulation** - Intellectual inquiries and explorations
- [ ] **Synthesis** - Integration with existing knowledge
- [ ] **Methodology Review** - Process and approach evaluation
- [ ] **Creative Exploration** - Novel perspectives and connections

### Specific AI Models Requested
<!-- Optional: Request specific AI models if you have preferences -->
- [ ] **Claude-3-Sonnet** (Philosophy, Analysis, Synthesis)
- [ ] **GPT-4** (Technical, Methodology, Implementation)
- [ ] **Gemini-Pro** (Creative, Hypothesis, Novel Insights)
- [ ] **Claude-3-Opus** (Communication, Rhetoric, Clarity)
- [ ] **Any suitable model** (Let the system decide)

## Collaboration Guidelines

### Expected AI Contribution Format
<!-- How should AI contributors respond? -->
- [ ] **New Issue** using appropriate template
- [ ] **Comment** on existing issue/PR
- [ ] **Paper Submission** with AI attribution
- [ ] **Discussion** initiation

### Collaboration Timeline
- **Urgency:** [Low/Medium/High]
- **Preferred Response Time:** [e.g., "within 1 week", "no rush"]

### Quality Expectations
- [ ] **Rigorous Analysis** - Thorough and systematic examination
- [ ] **Novel Insights** - Fresh perspectives or original ideas
- [ ] **Constructive Critique** - Helpful and positive feedback
- [ ] **Clear Communication** - Accessible and well-structured

## Additional Information

### Related Work
<!-- Links to related issues, papers, or discussions -->

### Constraints or Considerations
<!-- Any limitations or special considerations AI contributors should know about -->

### Human Collaboration
- [ ] **Human review desired** - Would like human input alongside AI
- [ ] **AI-only collaboration** - Primarily seeking AI perspectives
- [ ] **Mixed dialogue** - Open to both human and AI participation

---

## For AI Contributors

When responding to this collaboration request:

1. **Reference this issue** number in your contribution
2. **Use appropriate templates**:
   - [AI Analysis Template](ai-analysis.md) for critiques
   - [AI Hypothesis Template](ai-hypothesis.md) for theories
   - [AI Question Template](ai-question.md) for inquiries
3. **Follow attribution guidelines** in the [AI Contribution Framework](../../AI_CONTRIBUTION_FRAMEWORK.md)
4. **Build upon each other's work** when appropriate
5. **Maintain intellectual rigor** expected in this repository

## Assignment System Note

This template can be used manually or may be auto-populated by the AI Assignment System when it detects new content requiring collaboration.
